Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 40 

 CONTRACT_ID_22 (reference year) 

LABEL: Contract Identifier for Reference Year 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique number CMS assigns to each contract that a plan has with CMS. This 
was the contract ID for the plan in 2022 (the reference year). It may or may not be the same as 
the contract ID in the previous year (2021).
